commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - No repair lane is needed; the branch is reviewable as-is and should proceed through normal maintainer review and CI.; Cleared: The diff only changes CLI session-name routing and regression tests; it does not touch dependencies, workflows, scripts, credentials, or publishing metadata. (sha=6b34141cf091d301b18ed119f10b1c06929656b3)
commands.review_summary:
This PR changes `handlePrompt` to resolve session names through the existing parent-aware flag helper and adds a regression test for `codex -s <name> prompt ...`.

Reproducibility: yes. The linked reporter transcript plus current source show `handlePrompt` only reads local `flags.session`, while Commander can place `-s` on the parent agent command when it appears before `prompt`.
commands.review_followup: - No repair lane is needed; the branch is reviewable as-is and should proceed through normal maintainer review and CI.

target.title: fix: honor parent session flag for prompts
target.body:
## Summary
- resolve prompt session names through parent/global command flags like the other session subcommands
- add regression coverage for `codex -s <name> prompt ...`
- drop the release-owned changelog edit from this PR

Fixes #355.

## Validation
- `pnpm run build:test && node --test dist-test/test/cli.test.js --test-name-pattern "prompt resolves named session"`
- `pnpm run format:check`
- manual CLI proof with built `dist/cli.js`

## Proof
Focused regression proof:

```text
✔ prompt resolves named session from parent -s flag
ℹ tests 78
ℹ pass 78
```

Manual real CLI proof for `-s` before `prompt`:

```text
command: HOME=<tmp> node dist/cli.js --cwd <tmp>/workspace codex -s named prompt ping
exit_code: 1
stdout: [error] RUNTIME: Failed to spawn agent command: acpx-proof-missing-agent
stderr: [acpx] session named (named-prompt-session) · <tmp>/workspace · agent needs reconnect
```
target.author: turbotheturtle

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
